neqsim.process.allocation.ProductionAllocationResult

Package
Description
neqsim.process.allocation
Linear recovery-factor production allocation (proxy network).

  • Uses of ProductionAllocationResult in neqsim.process.allocation

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final Map<AllocationMethod,ProductionAllocationResult>
    AllocationComparison.results
    The per-method allocation results, in run order.
    Methods in neqsim.process.allocation that return ProductionAllocationResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ProductionAllocationResult
    MultiMethodAllocator.allocate(AllocationMethod method)
    Runs a single allocation method.
    ProductionAllocationResult
    SourceAllocator.allocate()
    Runs the allocation: builds source injections, solves the linear network per component, maps node flows onto custody outlets, and optionally renormalises to base-case totals.
    private ProductionAllocationResult
    MultiMethodAllocator.allocateAllIn()
    Builds the allocation result for the all-in linear proxy method by delegating to SourceAllocator, which freezes per-equipment split factors and propagates each source through the network by superposition.
    private ProductionAllocationResult
    MultiMethodAllocator.allocateComponentRatio()
    Builds the allocation result for the common overall recovery factor method.
    private ProductionAllocationResult
    MultiMethodAllocator.allocateStandAlone()
    Builds the allocation result for the isolated stand-alone method.
    private ProductionAllocationResult
    MultiMethodAllocator.buildResult(double[][][] alloc, String method)
    Wraps an allocation array in a ProductionAllocationResult using the shared component slate and a uniform per-component diagnostic tag.
    ProductionAllocationResult
    AllocationComparison.getResult(AllocationMethod method)
    Gets the result for a method.
